text:
to anyone complaining that this doesn't have enough views, especially compared to the pony version, this is the sad rule of "remixes" and "tributes": you bring awesome original content, slightly modified, to a whole new, bigger crowd, but very few among these will care to check out the original, as long as they can enjoy the "thing".

And in this particular case, face it, there are much more fans of ponies than of chiptunes.
